ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Sequencing reference used to identify the origin of an RNA molecule

Notes: 1= Visit A - Participants were asked to abstain from cannabis use for two weeks prior to sample collection; 2= Visit B - Participants were asked to use cannabis at their normal frequency

ElementDescription: Highest level of education completed for adult subject
Notes: 1 = Grades 1 to 11; 2 = High school graduate or GED; 3 = Associate or technical degree; 4 = Bachelor's degree; 5 = Master's degree; 6 = Doctorate or equivalent professional degree; 9 = Unknown

ElementDescription: What best describes your current romantic relationship status?
Notes: 2=In a committed relationship; 3=Married; 4=In a domestic partnership or civil union; 5=Other; 888=Choose not to respond; If  Married ,  In a domestic partnership or civil union , progress to svmarriage; If  In a committed relationship  or  other , progress to svrel; If Choose not to respond, progress to svrel

ElementDescription: What is YOUR current employment status?
Notes: 1 = Full-time (more than 30 hours/week); 2 = Part-time (Less than 30 hours/week); 3 = Unemployed/Disabled/Retired/Other; 4 = Full-time student; 5 = Homemaker/Full-time parent

ElementDescription: How do you define your ethnicity?
Notes: 1= Hispanic or Latin/a/o/x/e; 2= Not Hispanic or Latin/a/o/x/e; 3= Another; 4= Do not wish to respond

ValueRange: American Indian/Alaska Native; Asian; Hawaiian or Pacific Islander; Black or African American; White; More than one race; Unknown or not reported; Other Non-White; Other

ElementDescription: Total grams of non-study cannabis flower used

Notes: Percentage of alcohol use days (0-100%) self-reported via daily diary prior to sample collection; (Number of alcohol use days/Number of daily diaries completed)

ElementDescription: Avg drinks per day of any alcohol used

Notes: Average minutes of aerobic and anaerobic exercise per day self-reported via daily diary 14 days prior to sample collection
Total self-reported number of servings of fruits and vegetables per week via the food frequency scale
Total self-reported number of servings of meat per week via the food frequency scale
